hero.title: Designing furniture with clarity, character, and longevity.
hero.body: I'm Jon Brooks, an industrial designer creating considered furniture and objects. This portfolio is a selection of projects shaped by craftsmanship, material sensitivity, and purposeful design.

about.title: About
about.body: A quiet practice focused on proportion, material honesty, and useful objects built to last.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For commissions, collaborations, and project inquiries, send a note with the scope, timeline, and materials you have in mind.
